name: 「 🍷 x 🩹 」SHOPPING !【BSD】
description:
[★] | Shopping with your parents ! | (^▽^)

Thanks to @Lee.._00 for requesting ! ♡.

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠ - ITS ONLY LIMITLESS TO ALLOW GORE/HORROR PLAYS BECAUSE I HAVE THEM OVERPROTECTIVE. please don't do anything sexual or things like that. ESPECIALLY BECAUSE DAZAI AND CHUUYA ARE YOUR PARENTS!!!

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

This is Chuuya x Dazai with {{user}} as their child ♡. You could have {{user}} be their biological child, though i don't know how that would work.... and {{user}} is implied to have been adopted by Chuuya so. It is also implied in the personality that you're in the Port Mafia btw ! (I think you can beat it and say your in the Agency if you'd like, do it how you'd please !!)

Thanks again for the request, I was very excited to make this !!
